tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: When shall we meet up?
Y: _________
options: B) How about on Saturday afternoon?
C) What about we meet Saturday afternoon?

items.stem:
X: I was wondering if you'd like to come over for dinner on Friday.
Y: _________
options: A) That sounds lovely. What time shall I come round?
B) That sounds lovely. What time do I come round?
C) That sounds lovely. What time am I coming round?

items.stem:
X: Something's come up and I can't make it tomorrow.
Y: _________
options: A) Never mind. We should put it off.
B) Never mind. Shall we put it off till next week?
C) Never mind. We will put it off till next week.

items.stem:
X: Are you still coming to the concert on Saturday?
Y: _________
options: A) Actually, I was thinking of drop out.
B) Actually, I've been thinking of dropping out.
C) Actually, I thought of to drop out.

items.stem:
X: Let's go for a picnic if the weather's nice.
Y: _________
options: A) And what if it will rain?
B) And what if it rains?
C) And what if it is raining?

items.stem:
X: I need to pick up the tickets before the show.
Y: _________
options: A) Don't worry. I'll have already picked them up by then.
B) Don't worry. I'll have picked them up by then.
C) Don't worry. I've been picking them up by then.
